entities.name: BHOOCHETANA
entities.description: A soil test-based fertilizer management initiative aimed at scaling out nutrient management in Karnataka, India

entities.description: A macro nutrient applied to soil for crop growth

entities.name: BLANKET APPLICATION
entities.description: The farmer practice of applying nutrients without soil testing

entities.description: A specific indicator of soil health that increased under improved practices

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY

entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area
